findings.description:
Reentrancy in ReentrancySimple.withdraw() (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#16-26):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}() (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#21)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] = 0 (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#25)
	ReentrancySimple.balances (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#10) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ReentrancySimple.balances (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#10)
	- ReentrancySimple.deposit() (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#12-14)
	- ReentrancySimple.getBalance() (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#28-30)
	- ReentrancySimple.withdraw() (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#16-26)

Version constraint ^0.8.0 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.0 (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#2)

Low level call in ReentrancySimple.withdraw() (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#16-26):
	- (success,None) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}() (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#21)

Reentrancy in ReentrancySimple.withdraw() (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#16-26):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}() (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#21)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] = 0 (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#25)
	ReentrancySimple.balances (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#10) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ReentrancySimple.balances (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#10)
	- ReentrancySimple.deposit() (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#12-14)
	- ReentrancySimple.getBalance() (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#28-30)
	- ReentrancySimple.withdraw() (examples/reentrancy_simple.sol#16-26)
findings.recommendation: Manual review recommended (GPT analysis not available)
